title: Otohime Asks for Signatures
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Arlong, Unknown person #1, Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5. The core beat is otohime asks for signatures.
scene: The scene follows otohime asks for signatures, keeping the focus on Arlong, Unknown person #1, Fisher Tiger, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Our goal here is not to take revenge for the discrimi- nation we have suffered!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The same goes for my actions at MarieJoa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I may have violated their worthless laws...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But ultimately, all I did was free those who were suffering from their oppression!!

dialogue.speaker: Fisher Tiger
dialogue.text: We of the Sun Pirates Fight for "Freedom" and "liberty".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And that is the extent of it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If we wallow in our resentment and start actively taking revenge upon the humans...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...then it will lead only to further tragedy when the humans take their own revenge in return.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: future generations of fishmen, who have done no wrong, will suffer for the pain we have caused.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Under- stood?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: certainly, we will fight with and steal from those who pursue us...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we will stand firm to our morals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We will not take a life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hah!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How about this, then, big bro?! You think revenge will only breed more revenge?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I say we should just take the lot of 'em out once and for all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Be cruel and ruthless!!! Make the humans cover in terror!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: That way, they won't dare even think about taking revenge on us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only problem here is that they don't understand how powerful we really are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we show them!! Make sure they'll never forget!!! Teach them "fear"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The hell was that for, jimbei ...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: JIMBE! ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: The peaceful solution that Queen Otohime seeks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That is the ideal for which we all should strive.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: to her... I must seem little different from arlong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You know ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one thing I fear above all else...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Is the demon that lurks within me....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Enemy Approachi IIING!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's a pirate ship!!! nyuu!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They mean to defeat us and earn glory for themselves ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So it's not just Marines we have to deal with, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: attack !!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Please, I need your signatures!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: We can't, your majesty!! We can't live with the humans!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The govern- Ment's issued Bounties ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...for boss til and jimbel- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Worthless humans!!! What are you, blind?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But we must. ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They've Got Bounties!! Awesome!!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Your signatures !!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In this way, around three years passed. (12 years ago)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A certain island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We humbly beg this of your crew...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This child was one of the many freed from MarieJoa three years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: smile

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Thanks to your heroic deeds.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, her home is very far from here, and we do not possess the seafaring skills to take her there.

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: My name's Koala!! I'm 11!! Thank you so much...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...for saving me three years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kid or otherwise, she's still a filthy human!!! She makes me sick!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do I have to share this ship with a human brat ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Because those are the Circum- stances.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop Smirking at me like that!! It pisses me off so much!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong- San!!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Arlong- Saaaan!! She's only a child!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It certainly is a little creepy how she keeps on smiling.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Scrub

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Scrub scrub

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Squeak squeak

summary: Otohime Asks for Signatures. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
